about.title: Live Your Best Life
about.description: Pinecrest Townhomes offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and community. Our spacious townhomes feature modern finishes, private outdoor spaces, and access to resort-style amenities. Located in the heart of Atlanta, you'll enjoy easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment.

amenities.title: Premium Amenities
amenities.description: Experience resort-style living with our extensive amenity package.

floorplans.title: Our Floor Plans
floorplans.description: Spacious layouts designed for modern living

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to find your new home? Contact us today to schedule a tour.

cta.title: Ready to Make Pinecrest Home?
cta.description: Schedule a tour today and discover your perfect townhome.
